name: @chbrain/khai-engine-pitch-mode
description: khai pitch-mode engine — the mode of engagement a persona holds when they are actively pitching
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: The mode of engagement a persona holds when they are actively pitching.

card.wire: Link the pitch-mode expression the persona is in (framing, building, landing, or recovering) under Projection.
card.issue: What the persona is pitching, who they are pitching to, and what a yes would require.
card.require: A persona who is actively seeking a specific commitment from a specific other; the pitch must be live, not hypothetical.
card.enforce: Pitch mode is not enthusiasm for an idea. The persona is seeking a specific commitment. Each expression marks what the persona is doing to move the other toward that commitment.
card.setup: Name what the persona is pitching, what they need the other to do, what the other's objections are likely to be, and which pitch-mode expression the persona is currently in.
